name: rankradar-os
description: A focused DataDive Rank Radar monitoring and alerting layer with React, Node.js, and Python.

scripts.test: npm --workspace apps/api test && npm --workspace apps/web test && cd services/rankradar-worker && python -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.check: npm --workspace apps/api run check && npm --workspace apps/web run check && python -m compileall services/rankradar-worker/app
